title: TFC:UPGRADE
description: A modpack based on TFC and Create, IE of course.
body:
# Describe

This is a TerraFirmaCraft and Create based integration pack.

## Important Reminder.
You will need to download the following two additional mods from CourseForge

+ [TFC: Grooming Station](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-grooming-station/files/5310649)
+ [TFC Casting with Channels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-casting-with-channels/files/5046696)
+ [FTB XMod Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat/files/5257897)
+ [FTB Teams (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge/files/5267190)
+ [FTB Quests (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge/files/5816794)
+ [FTB Library (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge/files/5925398)
+ [Item Filters](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-filters/files/4838266)
+ [Flerovium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flerovium/files/5956195)

## Features.
1. clean: removes all recipes for inaccessible items and hides them from the jei
2. Automated Metallurgy: Added recipes for all alloys and metals in the Range via Create: Metallurgy.
3. Miner's Favorite: Fixed the fact that the Time Attachment doesn't work on ores when Time Attachment + Wash Attachment is used.
4. Power Age: You can wash uranium ore to get a small amount of thorium ore.
5. Diesel power: every oil field is now unlimited, enjoy!
6. Balance Adjustment: Some convenient tech lines can only be done after unlocking Red, Blue, and Steel techs!


# 简体中文

这是一个以TerraFirmaCraft和Create为主的整合包。

## 重要提醒:
你需要从CourseForge 额外下载以下两个mod

+ [TFC: Grooming Station](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-grooming-station/files/5310649)
+ [TFC Casting with Channels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-casting-with-channels/files/5046696)
+ [FTB XMod Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat/files/5257897)
+ [FTB Teams (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge/files/5267190)
+ [FTB Quests (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge/files/5816794)
+ [FTB Library (Forge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge/files/5925398)
+ [Item Filters](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/item-filters/files/4838266)


## 特性:
1. 干净：删除了所有不可获取物品的配方，并且将他们从jei中隐藏
2. 自动化冶金：通过Create: Metallurgy 为群峦所有的合金以及金属都添加了配方
3. 群峦矿工最爱的版本：修复了时运附属+洗矿附属时，时运附魔对矿石不生效
4. 电力时代：你可以通过水洗铀矿获取少量的钍矿
5. 柴油动力：现在每一块油田都是无限的，尽情享受
6. 平衡性调整：有些方便的科技线，只能在解锁了红蓝钢科技之后才可以进行
7. 洗矿产物增加，现在的洗矿产出为原版的2倍以上，鼓风机水洗为2.5倍
8. 机械动力的海带需求，替换为afc的橡胶，乳胶的产量增加且不受 时间/温度/季节 的影响
9. 更改橡胶科技线，删除原版海带（均替换为橡胶）
10. 现在高岭土生成条件为 温度8°以上，降雨量200毫升以上
11. 提高洗矿槽产量，现在产量为原版2倍+，鼓风机为0.0.1版本 2.5倍，减少前期坐牢程度
12. 修复沉浸工程柴油发电机喝水发电
